expected_properties: Sum output S equals (A + B) modulo 2^32
Carry-out C32 is asserted when adding maximum operands.
additional_cases.goal: Verify correct carry‑out generation when the addition overflows the 32‑bit range.
notes: Uses the extreme case where both operands are all ones.
stimulus_intent: Drive A and B with 0xFFFFFFFF to provoke a carry‑out.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs settle; combinational latency is unspecified.

expected_properties: Sum output S equals (A + B) modulo 2^32
Carry-out C32 reflects overflow of (A + B) beyond 32 bits
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate combinational correctness of the adder across representative operand values.
notes: Ensures basic arithmetic functionality without assuming any internal timing.
stimulus_intent: Apply random legal values to inputs A and B covering the full 32‑bit range.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs have stabilized; no cycle‑accurate timing assumed.
